case_title: LOBEL FINANCIAL CORP. VS. WEIDY YAMILETH MANGUIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOBEL FINANCIAL CORP.
